title: Eric Thode
compiled_truth: Eric Thode is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-01-11), Eric Thode sent 86 and received 545 emails, totalling 631 interactions. Top correspondents: [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (33), [Karen Denne](people/karen-denne) (29), [Greg Whalley](people/greg-whalley) (27), [Mark Frevert](people/mark-frevert) (25), [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (21). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, deleted_items, dynegy_transaction, inbox, pr___notre_dame, pr_crisis_management.
